mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_sla_policy SET policy_name = #{policyName}, category = #{category}, priority = #{priority}, first_response_minutes = #{firstResponseMinutes}, resolve_minutes = #{resolveMinutes}, enabled = #{enabled} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ticket_sla_policy WHERE enabled = 1 AND (category IS NULL OR category = #{category}) AND (priority IS NULL OR priority = #{priority}) ORDER BY CASE WHEN category IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END + CASE WHEN priority IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
